_about: User preferences for the main app (app/main.js). Copy this file to config.json (gitignored) and edit. Environment variables (PS_LOG_LEVEL, PS_TIMEZONE) still override these at runtime for scripting.
_credentials: Nothing credential-related is configured here. In official mode you log in through the live client UI and Electron persists the session automatically (default session, disk-backed) across restarts. In local mode (PS_SERVER=local) the app reads a testclient sid from ~/Documents/pokemon-showdown-client/config/testclient-key.js (override path with PS_TESTCLIENT_KEY_PATH). There is no password or token to put in this file.
_iconPath: Optional. Sets the live window/taskbar icon (Linux/Windows) and the macOS Dock icon at runtime. Tilde (~) is expanded. Falls back to the bundled icon if the path is missing or unreadable. Does NOT change the baked installer icon.
_checkUpdatesOnBoot: Optional. When true, the app shows an update screen on boot that checks whether the Pokémon Showdown upstream submodules have new commits. If updates are found, you can apply them in-place and run the test suite as a verification gate; if tests fail a one-click rollback restores the prior state. Defaults to false. Only applies when running from source — packaged installs show a link to GitHub Releases instead.
